additional_rules.name: hardcoded-version-in-build
additional_rules.message: Hardcoded version string in build script — use version catalog (libs.versions.toml)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move version to gradle/libs.versions.toml and reference via libs.* accessor

additional_rules.name: allprojects-subprojects-block
additional_rules.message: allprojects/subprojects block detected — use convention plugins in build-logic/ instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Extract shared configuration into a convention plugin under build-logic/src/main/kotlin/ and apply it in each module

additional_rules.name: eager-task-creation
additional_rules.message: Eager task creation — use tasks.register() for lazy task avoidance
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace tasks.create() or task() with tasks.register() to defer task instantiation until needed

additional_rules.name: deprecated-dependency-configuration
additional_rules.message: Deprecated dependency configuration — removed in Gradle 7.0

additional_rules.name: ext-property-for-version
additional_rules.message: Version managed via ext/extra property — use version catalog (libs.versions.toml) for type-safe, IDE-supported version management
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move version to [versions] section in gradle/libs.versions.toml and use libs.* accessors
